titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of TNA DL 25/91

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=860 status=live modified=2021-04-07 09:21:11.537684+00 | translation moa=861 status=live modified=2021-04-07 09:21:07.699976+00

p.cl: dunegal filius Vdavd omnibus qui audient uel uidebunt literas istas . Salutem .

Sciatis me reddidisse et per
fustem et battonem et quietam clamasse willelmo de brus et heredibus suis de me et heredibus meis et abiuras
se in plenaria curia illi et heredibus suis pro me et heredibus meis terram quam de eo tenebam . silicet unam caru
catam terre in weremundebi . et dimidiam curucatam terre in anant cum uno tofto  ad opus gileberti
filii iohannis tenendam de predicto Willelmo de brus et heredibus suis Gileberto et heredibus suis . et hanc meam cartam eidem
Willelmo de brus dedi in testimonium huius reddicionis et quietclamacionis et abiutarionis .

His testibus Willelmo in...
adam de Set’ . Roberto de Hodalm . Humfrido del gardin . adam filio adam . Ricardo de penresax . Willelmo de heriz ...
Murdac . vdardo de hodalm hugone de corri . hugone filio ingebald . Waltero de Walham . patricio brus . W...
Walbi . adam de dunwidie . Roberto de crossebi . Ricardo de bosco . Roberto de leuingtouna . Rogero de Kirk...
Malcolum loccard . Roberto de tremor . Willelmo de heneuil’ . hugone Malleuerer . et Multis aliis
Dúngal son of Udard, to all who shall hear or view these letters, sends greeting.

Know me to have given back and by rod and staff also quitclaimed to William de Brus and his heirs for myself and my heirs, and abjured in full court to him and his heirs for myself and my heirs, the land which I used to hold of him, that is, one ploughgate of land in Warmanbie, and a half ploughgate of land in Annan with one toft for the use of Gilbert son of John; for Gilbert and his heirs to hold of the aforesaid William de Brus and his heirs; and I have given this my charter to the same William de Brus as witness of this restoration, quitclaim and abjuration.

With these witnesses: William ... ; Adam of Seton; Robert of Hoddam; Humphrey de Jardin; Adam son of Adam; Richard of Pennersaughs; William de Heriz ... Murdoch; Udard of Hoddam; Hugh of Corrie; Hugh son of Ingebald; Walter of Walham; Patrick Brus; W ... Walbi; Adam of Dunwoodie; Robert of Crosby; Richard del Bois; Robert of Levington; Roger of Kirkpatrick; Malcolm Lockhart; Robert of Tremore; William de Heineville; Hugh Mauleverer; and many others.
